hero.title: Insurance and reinsurance, made for Angola
hero.description: Since 2017, we have helped corporate, energy, and oil & gas clients in Angola put the right insurance, reinsurance, and risk-management programmes in place. We are ANPG-certified and work with the country's leading insurers.

whoWeAre.title: An Angolan brokerage for the country's most demanding sectors
paragraphs: Detondo is an Angolan insurance and reinsurance brokerage, established in 2017 and headquartered in Luanda. Since the company started, we have worked with individual, corporate, and institutional clients across many sectors of the Angolan economy.

Over the years we have built strong expertise in the country's most demanding lines: corporate, oil & gas, marine, energy, construction all risks, liability, and health and life. We back these up with reinsurance and corporate risk-management programmes.

Our work comes down to staying close to our clients, getting the placement right the first time, and handling claims properly when they happen. The result is a brokerage that Angola's leading insurers and corporate operators trust to structure, negotiate, and stand behind their risk programmes.
whoWeAre.quote: We are the brokerage Angola's leading insurers and corporate operators trust to stand behind their risk programmes.

numbers.title: Detondo by the numbers
numbers.description: A short read on the foundations behind every programme we place.

sectors.title: Sectors we know best
sectors.description: Detondo focuses on corporate, energy, oil & gas, and mining, the sectors where Angolan businesses most need a steady hand. We design risk programmes that meet international standards.

items.name: Corporate
items.description: Risk programmes for Angolan and multinational companies operating across multiple sectors of the economy. From property and liability cover to employee benefits and corporate risk management.

items.name: Energy
items.description: Cover for power generation, transmission, and renewable energy projects. Designed around the day-to-day realities of Angolan energy assets and the contractors who build and run them.

items.name: Oil & Gas
items.description: Upstream, midstream, and downstream cover. Detondo is certified by ANPG to provide goods and services to Angola's Oil & Gas sector.

items.name: Mining & Mineral Resources
items.description: Specialised insurance solutions for mining companies, mineral exploration projects, quarries, and natural stone operations. We structure tailored programmes to manage operational, financial, and risk exposure across the mining value chain.

anpg.title: Certified to serve Angola's Oil & Gas sector
anpg.description: Detondo is certified by ANPG, Angola's National Oil, Gas and Biofuels Agency, to provide goods and services to operators across the Oil & Gas value chain.
anpg.issuer: Issued by ANPG · Agência Nacional de Petróleo, Gás e Biocombustíveis de Angola

arseg.title: Registered and supervised by ARSEG
arseg.description: DETONDO - Corretora de Seguros, Lda is listed among the authorised insurance mediation entities by ARSEG, Angola's Insurance Regulation and Supervision Agency, as a registered insurance broker.

partners.title: Insurers and reinsurers we work with
partners.description: We place business with the major insurers in the Angolan market and with leading international reinsurers, giving our clients more capacity, better pricing, and reliable claims-handling.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.description: To be a global risk solutions provider of choice, delivering exceptional results through the balance of our strengths: innovation, precision, and service.
vision.valuesDescription: Our values are the foundation of how we operate. They guide our decisions and the determination to live up to our vision. We hold the highest standards in everything we do.

values.name: Innovation
values.description: Constantly developing alternative solutions for the benefit of our clients. Turning challenges into opportunities.

values.name: Modernization
values.description: Delivering modern, well-built products and services, and embracing change.

values.name: Proactivity & dynamism
values.description: Going beyond expectations through challenging standards and designing the most effective risk-transfer solutions.

values.name: Service excellence
values.description: Precise advice and tested solutions that meet and exceed the targets our clients and partners set.

values.name: Precision
values.description: Giving accurate advice every time and meeting every goal we agree to.

commitment.title: We are with you at every step
commitment.description: From the first conversation to the claim, our team makes sure the right cover is in place, and that you know exactly what is protected.

pillars.title: Structuring and negotiating the best insurance
pillars.description: We help structure and negotiate insurance built around your needs. We make sure you understand the product, the cover, and the premiums, and that you end up with the insurer that best fits your profile.

pillars.title: Policy maintenance
pillars.description: Our consultants handle changes, additions, updates, and cancellations. We check in with you regularly so your policy stays current.

pillars.title: Claims management
pillars.description: Our team will be with you through every step. We help file claims and make sure you get the service and the fair payout you are owed.

personal.title: Cover for you and what matters most
personal.description: From the car to the trip, we cover everyday risks with clear policies and real human support.

items.name: Motor insurance
items.description: Comprehensive cover for your vehicles, with car rental, roadside assistance, and other value-added services. Third-party, fire, and theft cover also available.

items.name: Building insurance
items.description: Your home is likely your most important investment. We make sure it is properly insured, at the right premium.

items.name: Home contents insurance
items.description: Household contents covered against theft, fire, water damage, and other events. We run adequacy checks on the sum insured.

items.name: All risks
items.description: All your valuables correctly covered, anywhere in the world.

items.name: Personal liability
items.description: Cover for legal matters that may come up in your everyday life.

items.name: Travel insurance
items.description: Regional or international travel covered for medical expenses, lost luggage, accidental death, and more.

meta.title: Motor Insurance | Detondo Seguros
meta.description: Comprehensive vehicle coverage in Angola. Third-party liability, own damage, 24-hour assistance and replacement hire car. Get a quote today.

motor.title: Motor insurance
motor.description: Comprehensive coverage for your vehicles, with third-party liability, own damage protection, 24-hour roadside assistance and a replacement hire car.
motor.detailsTitle: Why choose Detondo for your motor insurance
motor.details: We manage the entire process from start to finish: we assess your needs, negotiate with Angola's leading insurers and make sure you get the right cover at the most competitive premium. If you have a claim, our team supports you all the way through to resolution.

meta.title: Building Insurance | Detondo Seguros
meta.description: Protection for your property in Angola. Coverage against fire, flood, structural damage and owner's liability. Contact us today.

building.title: Building insurance
building.description: Your home is likely your most important investment. We make sure it is properly protected, with the right coverage for the true rebuilding value of your property.
building.detailsTitle: Why choose Detondo for your building insurance
building.details: We ensure the insured value reflects the true rebuilding cost of the property, not just the market value. Many homeowners are underinsured because they don't update their sum insured as construction costs rise. Our team reviews your policy regularly to prevent that.

meta.title: Home Contents Insurance | Detondo Seguros
meta.description: Your home contents protected against theft, fire and water damage in Angola. Tailored coverage for your belongings. Get a quote today.

home-contents.title: Home contents insurance
home-contents.description: Your home contents protected against theft, fire and water damage. We ensure the insured value reflects the true worth of your belongings.
home-contents.detailsTitle: Why choose Detondo for your home contents insurance
home-contents.details: Many families underestimate the total value of their belongings and end up exposed when a claim occurs. Our team helps you calculate the right sum insured, ensuring real coverage when you need it most. We also advise on how to protect specific valuables.

meta.title: Personal All-Risks Insurance | Detondo Seguros
meta.description: Protection for your valuables anywhere in the world. Mobile phones, electronics, jewellery and more. Contact us today.

all-risks.title: Personal all-risks
all-risks.description: Protection for your valuables anywhere in the world. Mobile phones, cameras, laptops, jewellery and more, covered even when you're away from home.
all-risks.detailsTitle: Why choose Detondo for your personal all-risks insurance
all-risks.details: Personal all-risks coverage is ideal for those who travel frequently or use valuable equipment away from home. Unlike contents insurance, which covers the home, this product follows you wherever you go. Detondo helps you select the right items to insure and keeps the sum insured current.

meta.title: Personal Liability Insurance | Detondo Seguros
meta.description: Financial protection for damage caused to others in daily life. Legal costs, compensation and more. Get a quote today.

liability.title: Personal liability
liability.description: Financial protection when an accident you cause to others leads to legal costs or compensation claims. Coverage that shields your personal assets.
features: Bodily injury caused to third parties
Property damage caused to third parties
liability.detailsTitle: Why choose Detondo for your personal liability insurance
liability.details: A seemingly simple accident can lead to legal costs and compensation that quickly exceed a family's savings. Personal liability insurance ensures your financial stability is protected in unforeseen situations. Detondo helps you size the right coverage for your lifestyle.

meta.title: Travel Insurance | Detondo Seguros
meta.description: Regional and international travel covered for emergency medical expenses, repatriation, luggage and cancellation. Contact us today.

travel.title: Travel insurance
travel.description: Travel with peace of mind, with coverage for emergency medical expenses, repatriation, lost luggage and trip cancellation, for regional or international destinations.
features: Medical repatriation and repatriation of remains
travel.detailsTitle: Why choose Detondo for your travel insurance
travel.details: A medical emergency abroad can cost tens of thousands of dollars. Travel insurance ensures you have access to quality care and can return home safely, without that cost falling on you or your family. Detondo offers coverage for individual trips and annual multi-trip programmes.

business.title: Cover for the corporate, energy, oil & gas, and mining sectors
business.description: Our specialists identify business risks and design tailored programmes for everything from corporate covers to oil & gas, energy, marine, construction all risks, and mining operations. Group schemes are also available.
business.groupDescription: We also provide insurance solutions for group schemes, with the following range of covers:

reinsurance.title: Treaty, facultative, and alternative risk transfer
reinsurance.description: Detondo helps clients meet underwriting and capital-management goals at both start-up and mature insurance companies. We bring specialist reinsurance broking experience together with advisory work and the flexibility to negotiate with a wide range of reinsurers.

mining.title: Mining Insurance Solutions
mining.description: Tailored insurance programmes for mining companies, mineral exploration projects, quarries, and natural stone operations across Angola. We cover the full mining value chain, from extraction through to transport and export.

treaty.title: Treaty reinsurance handled at a strategic level
treaty.description: We treat treaty reinsurance as a strategic decision, focused on our clients' underwriting and capital objectives across the whole portfolio. Our international reach lets us put together flexible, structured, fairly priced treaty programmes that match each client's challenges and goals.
treaty.servicesDescription: We offer reinsurance broking, technical reinsurance accounting, claims management, and contract drafting.

services.title: Contract drafting
services.description: The wording is the foundation of the legal relationship between the reinsured and the reinsurers. We draft every contract carefully and stay current with new market wordings.

services.title: Technical accounting
services.description: Reinsurance accounts prepared strictly to the contract, profit-commission calculations, and premium adjustments. We manage run-off accounts on behalf of clients.

services.title: Reinsurance broking
services.description: Senior professionals analyse your needs and offer the best available solutions, backed by strong market relationships.

services.title: Claims management
services.description: We work with claims experts to gather, evaluate, and present claims. We invest in technology to speed up communication during the claims stage.

lifeHealth.title: Technical depth and the right networks
lifeHealth.description: Our specialist team brings strong technical expertise, market knowledge, and networks that let our clients offer better products and manage their capital more effectively.

testimonials.title: Stories from our clients
testimonials.description: Relationships built on trust, clarity, and fast response.

items.quote: Detondo's team turned something complicated into something simple. They explained every policy detail and were there when we needed them most.
items.author: CFO

items.quote: They placed a reinsurance programme on a tight deadline with terms that seemed impossible in the local market. Top-tier professionalism.
items.author: Technical Director

items.quote: Claim resolved in days, not months. Communication was transparent from start to finish.
items.author: Owner

ctaBand.title: Shall we design the right cover for you?
ctaBand.description: In a few minutes we can schedule a conversation to understand your needs and put the best available options in front of you.

hero.title: An Angolan brokerage based in Luanda since 2017
hero.description: Detondo is an Angolan insurance and reinsurance brokerage, established in 2017 and headquartered in Luanda. We deliver tailored solutions across corporate, energy, and oil & gas, backed by ANPG certification and a panel of the country's leading insurers.

about.missionDescription: To give our clients peace of mind and security through reliable insurance solutions. Every situation is different, so we make the time to understand what each client actually needs.
about.purposeDescription: To make insurance clearer and easier to deal with, so our clients can get on with their lives and their business with the peace of mind they deserve.

capabilities.title: Multi-sector expertise
capabilities.description: Strong practice in corporate, oil & gas, marine, energy, construction all risks, and liability, covering the most demanding parts of the Angolan economy.

capabilities.title: ANPG certification
capabilities.description: Officially authorised by Angola's National Oil, Gas and Biofuels Agency to provide goods and services to the Oil & Gas sector.

capabilities.title: Major-insurer panel
capabilities.description: Placements across the leading insurers operating in Angola, giving our clients more capacity and better pricing.

servicesHub.title: Three business lines, one commitment
servicesHub.description: Each line is run by dedicated specialists. Pick the area that best matches your need and explore what we offer in detail.

cards.name: Personal insurance
cards.description: For you and your family: motor, home, travel, all-risks, and more.

cards.name: Business insurance
cards.description: Corporate, oil & gas, energy, marine, construction all risks, and more.

cards.name: Reinsurance
cards.description: Treaty, facultative, and alternative risk-transfer solutions.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Detondo Corretora de Seguros is committed to protecting the privacy, confidentiality, and security of all client, partner, and website user information.
privacy.body:
Any personal or corporate information submitted through this website may be collected and processed solely for insurance, reinsurance, compliance, communication, and operational purposes.

Detondo Corretora de Seguros does not sell or unlawfully disclose confidential information to third parties, except where required by law, regulatory authorities, compliance obligations, insurers, reinsurers, or authorised business partners.

We implement reasonable administrative, technical, and organisational measures to protect data against unauthorised access, misuse, loss, or disclosure.

By using this website, users consent to the collection and use of information in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: By accessing and using this website, users agree to comply with the applicable terms, conditions, and policies governing the use of Detondo Corretora de Seguros digital platforms and services.
terms.body:
The information contained on this website is provided for general informational purposes only and may be updated, modified, or removed without prior notice.

Detondo Corretora de Seguros makes reasonable efforts to ensure the accuracy of the information published but does not guarantee that all information is complete, current, or error-free at all times.

Users may not misuse, reproduce, distribute, or commercially exploit website content without prior written authorisation.

The use of this website shall be governed by the applicable laws and regulatory framework of the Republic of Angola.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: We use cookies to improve your browsing experience and analyse website performance.
cookies.body: Cookies are small text files stored on your device. We use essential cookies for website functionality and, with your consent, analytics cookies. You can manage your preferences at any time through the cookie banner or your browser settings.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.intro: The information provided on this website is for general informational purposes only and does not constitute insurance, financial, legal, investment, or professional advice.
disclaimer.body:
Insurance coverage, policy terms, pricing, and conditions remain subject to insurer approval, underwriting requirements, and applicable contractual agreements.

Detondo Corretora de Seguros shall not be held liable for any direct or indirect losses arising from the use of information contained on this website.

Users are encouraged to contact our professional team directly for specific insurance, reinsurance, risk management, and corporate advisory support.

aml.title: AML & KYC Policy
aml.intro: Detondo Corretora de Seguros is committed to supporting international Anti-Money Laundering (AML), Counter-Financing of Terrorism (CFT), and Know Your Customer (KYC) compliance principles.
aml.body:
The company may request identification, corporate documentation, source of funds information, and other compliance-related documents where required by applicable regulations, insurers, reinsurers, financial institutions, or business partners.

Detondo Corretora de Seguros reserves the right to refuse, suspend, or terminate business relationships that do not satisfy internal compliance standards or applicable regulatory requirements.

Our compliance framework supports transparency, responsible business practices, and the prevention of financial crime.

regulatoryNotice.title: Regulatory Notice
regulatoryNotice.intro: Detondo Corretora de Seguros operates within the Angolan insurance sector regulatory framework and is committed to responsible insurance and reinsurance practices.
regulatoryNotice.body:
The company supports regulatory compliance, ethical business conduct, transparency, client confidentiality, and professional standards aligned with the insurance and financial services industry.

References to insurers, reinsurers, regulatory institutions, or international partners on this website are presented for informational and institutional purposes only.

Detondo Corretora de Seguros continuously works to strengthen its operational, compliance, and corporate governance standards in line with market best practices.
